creator: pavelivolkov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #4)
Hello.

1. git diff, this is a new tool for me. I'll try it.
2. "-f" I will delete. Accepted.
3. Okay, I'll give up on SQLVER.
4. There are no libtool archive files in FreeBSD. No one file. The file for pkgconf (.pc) is installed.

See alse:
  https://flameeyes.blog/2009/04/18/some-details-about-our-old-friends-the-la-files/
  https://flameeyes.blog/2008/04/14/what-about-those-la-files/
  https://freebsd-ports.freebsd.narkive.com/zSPSq1Bo/not-installing-the-la-files ".la files are a workaround for "weird" and broken OSes. FreeBSD is neither. We
don't need them." :)
